title: Customer DB3 pipe chart after hard refresh
description:
Customer-side pipe charts were failing after Ctrl+Shift+R because the chart resolved before folder DB3 bindings finished loading from the server, and failed downloads could cache a deny before the binding fallback ran.

PipeShare now waits for Customer/Employee inspection bindings before loading the pipe chart, does not show demo data when a remote link is missing, caches download auth only after the binding check, and keeps cross-job Employee DB3 links usable from Customer packages.

Who is affected: PipeShare Customer (and Employee) WinCan pipe chart on BASE.
changeLog: Await folder DB3 bindings before resolving remote pipe chart.
Stop masking missing Customer DB3 links with demo observations.
Cache download auth after inspection-binding fallback (not before).
Cross-job billable DB3 bind no longer requires Employee path view grant.
